final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a short-form video cover featuring the 8k GGU gaming monitor.

Style/medium: minimalist high-end poster design, Swiss typography, clean editorial layout
Composition: rule of thirds grid, large bold headline occupying upper third, product focal point at intersection
Subject: gaming monitor product shot, sleek bezel-less design, subtle screen glow
Scene/backdrop: pure black or near-black gradient background, generous negative space
Lighting/mood: soft rim light on monitor edges, subtle ambient glow suggesting display quality
Color palette: deep black background, bright white headline, single accent color (electric blue or cyan) for emphasis
Text (verbatim): "8k GGU 电竞显示器 1000hz"
Constraints: headline must dominate at thumbnail size; all text must be legible on mobile screens
Avoid: cluttered elements, multiple fonts, gradient backgrounds, busy textures, generic gaming RGB aesthetic, watermarks
